name: Reflection Gate
description: A mandatory cognitive pause before code execution to ensure alignment and safety.

planning_pause.name: The Planning Pause
planning_pause.description: A mandatory cognitive pause before code execution.
planning_pause.context: Before any multi-file edit or high-risk command.
planning_pause.implementation: 1. Stop current execution branch. 2. Generate implementation_plan.md. 3. Notify user with PathsToReview. 4. Wait for explicit 'Go' or approval.

best_practices: Always include a 'User Review Required' section in plans.
Small atomic changes are easier to verify than large ones.
Cite Axiom A2 (User Primacy) when unsure.
anti_patterns: Skipping the plan for 'simple' edits that affect core logic.
Executing commands before the user has seen the plan.
